prompt: Write a Python script using MDAnalysis and matplotlib that analyses a GROMACS trajectory of SARS-CoV-2 main protease (Mpro) in complex with a non-covalent inhibitor (using publicly available trajectory from COVID Moonshot or HTMD Drug Repurposing Hub). The script should: (1) compute RMSD of the protease and inhibitor over simulation time, (2) extract protein-ligand contact frequency using MDAnalysis contact analysis, (3) compute dimer interface stability via inter-chain contacts, (4) calculate MMPBSA binding energy over frames using gmx_MMPBSA, (5) output: RMSD time-series figure, contact frequency heatmap, and binding energy convergence plot. Include documentation for downloading COVID Moonshot trajectory data.
source_citation: Derived from COVID Moonshot trajectory repository and RCSB PDB; target: SARS-CoV-2 Mpro; organism: SARS-CoV-2; catalogue version v1.0

_provenance.target_class: SARS-CoV-2 NSP5 3CL cysteine protease (drug discovery MD target)
